markdownRemark.excerpt: As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, This is to inform you that the time for Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s 40 Aḥadīth class has been moved up to…
markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

This is to inform you that the time for Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān’s 40 Aḥadīth class has been moved up to 5:30pm on Sundays.

Please pass on this message.

Barakallahu feekum.
